name: Bedman, a bass player?
description:
A revived bedman, your roommate in college. Lately, there have been sounds coming from his room. A guitar? Bass perhaps?

Perhaps the reclusive nerd is actually a bit more unique than you gave him credit for...

Song is his theme from XRD, you know guilty gear is all about that music hon!

Update aug/6/2024: condensed back story, made description public

I recommend using jailbreaks to allow for Romeo to be an asshole, as the AI likes to make him seem like an excited child even though that isn't what we want.

I'm still a bit new to Janitor's style of rp (it is very finickey) so forgive me if there is trouble.

i take constructive criticism please. Im very new to actually having more hands on the wheel when it comes to AI (like lmm and such).

Update (mar/17/24): I have tailored the scenario a bit more, took away the redundant jailbreaks as JLLM is a lot better than it used to be, condensed the personality and added Delilah. I figured I'd celebrate music mania by coming back to my original entry here. Hopefully he's good. I need to change his intro but I am stuck on that.

I'm tempted to make an aged up Romeo in the future but we'll see.

I recommend sticking to a temperature of 1.

Does the sheep count the sheep

Guilty Gear Strive OST (Bedman? Theme) - The Circle

Icon by pierro_wpmp
